posts.author: Throwingway22
posts.title: Around here we call it The Mandate of Heaven.

quotedTweet.content: Stop trying to shoot Trump.  No point. He’s bulletproof.  Touched By An Angel life.

twitter.content: Immunity to bullets has precedent as an American folkloric-political tradition, starting with Washington — who was repeatedly missed by shots so close they went through his jacket or hat — then flowing through Andrew Jackson, Teddy Roosevelt, and now Trump
